zh.lifeSummary: 當Floris III van Holland於1141年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德哈阿爾姆時，他的父親Dirk VI van Holland27歲，母親Sophie von Rheineck27歲。他於1162年8月28日與Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1190年8月1日在土耳其哈代安塔吉亞安塔吉亞享年49歲，埋葬在土耳其哈代安塔吉亞安塔吉亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Floris III van Holland于1141年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德哈阿爾姆时，他的父亲Dirk VI van Holland27岁，母亲Sophie von Rheineck27岁。他于1162年8月28日与Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1190年8月1日在土耳其哈代安塔吉亞安塔吉亞享年49岁，埋葬在土耳其哈代安塔吉亞安塔吉亞。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Dutch: genitivized form of   Holland  .

variants.name: Howland
meanings: English: variant of   Holland  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Hovland  .

History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollon
meanings: English: altered form of   Holland  .

nameMeanings.name: Floris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a personal name derived from Latin flos, genitive floris ‘flower’.
Italian (Sardinia): plural form of   Flore  .
Greek: derivative of Floros , or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name, such as Florakis.

variants.name: Flore
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of flowers and the spring (a derivative of Latin flos ‘flower’, genitive floris). It is also the feminine form of the old Roman family name Florus, likewise derived from flos. Flora was little used in England before the 18th century, when it was imported from Scotland. In 1746 Flora Macdonald ( 1722–90 ) of Milton in South Uist helped Bonnie Prince Charlie to escape from there to the Island of Skye, disguised as a woman, after his defeat at Culloden. In fact, Flora was merely an Anglicized form of her Gaelic name, Fionnaghal, a variant of Fionnguala ( see Fionnuala ). However, her fame made the name Flora popular in the Highlands and elsewhere.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Floris III van Holland was born in 1141, in Haarlem, North Holland, Netherlands, his father, Dirk VI van Holland, was 27 and his mother, Sophie von Rheineck, was 27. He married Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland on 28 August 1162. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 1 August 1190, in Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Türkiye, at the age of 49, and was buried in Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Türkiye.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Floris III van Holland est né en 1141, à Haarlem, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Dirk VI van Holland, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sophie von Rheineck, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland le 28 août 1162. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 1 août 1190, à Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquie, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Floris III van Holland 1141 in Haarlem, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dirk VI van Holland 27 und seine Mutter Sophie von Rheineck 27. Er hat am 28. August 1162 Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 1. August 1190 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Türkei und wurde in Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Türkei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Floris III van Holland è nato il nel 1141 nel Haarlem, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Dirk VI van Holland, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sophie von Rheineck, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland il 28 agosto 1162. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 1 agosto 1190, nel Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turchia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turchia.

ja.lifeSummary: Floris III van Hollandが1141年にオランダノオルド-hオランドハアルレムで生まれた時，父Dirk VI van Hollandは27歳，母Sophie von Rheineckは27歳であった。1162年8月28日にAda of Huntingdon Countess of Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1190年8月1日にトルコハティイアンタクヤアンタクヤで49歳で死去し，トルコハティイアンタクヤアンタクヤにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Floris III van Holland(이)가 1141년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 하알렘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dirk VI van Holland(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie von Rheineck(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1162년 8월 28일 Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 8월 1일 튀르키예 하타이 앤타키아 앤타키아에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 튀르키예 하타이 앤타키아 앤타키아에 묻혔다.

pt.Haarlem, Noord-Holland, Nederland: Haarlem, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Floris III van Holland nasceu em 1141, em Haarlem, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Dirk VI van Holland, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sophie von Rheineck, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland em 28 de agosto de 1162. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1190, em Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquia, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Floris III van Holland родился в 1141 г. в местности хаарлем, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Dirk VI van Holland было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie von Rheineck, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland 28 августа 1162 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 1 августа 1190 г. в местности антакя, антакя, хатеи, Турция в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности антакя, антакя, хатеи, Турция.

sm.1157-1190: mai le 1157 e o'o I le 1190

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Floris III van Holland nació en 1141, en Haarlem, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Dirk VI van Holland, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sophie von Rheineck, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland el 28 de agosto de 1162. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1190, en Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquía, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquía.
